message:
feat: Implement ctypes callback thunks for C-to-Python calls

Complete callback implementation for when C code calls Python functions:

- Callback slot table (256 concurrent callbacks max)
- allocCallbackSlot/freeCallbackSlot: Manage callback registry
- callbackDispatcher: Main C-callable entry point (6 args)
- invokeCallback: Convert C args to Python, call callable, convert result
- _ctypes_set_callback_context: Thread-local thunk for dispatcher
- Thread-safe callback invocation with proper refcount management

This enables Python callback functions to be passed to C libraries:
  @CFUNCTYPE(c_int, c_int, c_int)
  def my_callback(a, b):
      return a + b
  lib.register_callback(my_callback)

120+ lines of callback infrastructure.
